reporting_rule: repo is full technical; chat summaries are descriptive and audio-friendly
generation_assignment_rule: equal non-fitted average of min-max normalized v0.4, v0.8, and v0.9 structural seed actions over minimal triplet; larger action = stronger damping = lighter generation
mass_status: ordinal only; no numerical mass claim
open_debts: generation-count selection law for excluding extended twin-prime candidates
